title: protium tenuifolium subsp. mcleodii
intro: Protium tenuifolium subsp. mcleodii is a subspecies of Protium tenuifolium, a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Protium tenuifolium subsp. mcleodii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tea, infusion, or essential oil, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
